chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-58 of 2023 (Gaman Bohar & others Vs. SHO PS Sarhad & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 564/2023 (Stay) 12-01-2024. Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General. ******** It was alleged by the private respondent that the applicant and others by making trespass in her house, maltreated her and her husband and then went away by committing mischief by declaring her to be Kari. By making such allegation, she sought for direction against the police to record her FIR, it was issued accordingly by learned Ist Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Ghotki vide order dated 24-01-2023, which is impugned by the applicant before this Court. Apparently, there is dispute between the parties over matrimonial affairs. The occurrence of incident is denied by DSP Complaint Cell in his report. In these circumstances learned Ex-Office Justice of Peace ought not to have directed the police to record the statement of private respondent for purpose of FIR by way of impugned order, it is set aside. The instant Crl. Mist. Application is disposed of accordingly together with listed application. The private respondent however may exhaust remedy u/s 200 Cr. P.C, if so is advised to her. JUDGE 2 Nasim/P.A 3
